description: Check a LaTeX treatment plan for the 10 required sections, SMART goal criteria, HIPAA de-identification notice, provider signature, and remaining uncustomized placeholders. Read-only.
rules: read-only: never modifies the input plan
stdlib only (re, argparse) — no third-party deps
usage: Set PLAN_FILE to a .tex treatment plan. Output: completeness.txt.
limitation: Pure regex/section audit — it does not compile LaTeX or judge clinical correctness. The core exits non-zero when <80% of sections are present; the porter still records the report.
